results.title: Hamiltonian Descent Methods (arXiv 1809.05042)
results.snippet: Maddison et al. Hamiltonian descent generalizes momentum with non-standard kinetic energy; linear convergence; relates to gradient clipping, Adam.

results.title: Hamiltonian Descent Algorithms with Randomized Integration Time (arXiv 2505.12553)
results.snippet: Accelerated rates via randomized integration time. Hamiltonian-flow-based optimizer.

results.title: Born-Infeld (BI) for AI: Energy-Conserving Descent ECD (arXiv 2201.11137)
results.snippet: Energy-conserving descent (ECD) for optimization. Directly uses energy conservation as algorithmic principle for non-convex loss.

results.snippet: Port-Hamiltonian dynamics for NN training; loss as energy; dissipative system.
